name: Generate a utility function
prompt: Write a JavaScript file called isPrime.js in /tmp/axis-e2e-generate that exports a function `isPrime(n)` which returns true if n is a prime number and false otherwise. It should handle edge cases (negative numbers, 0, 1). Do not use any external libraries.

rubric.check: File isPrime.js exists at the target path
Handles edge cases: negative numbers return false
